text: Awɔɔ Zɩ k'a nɩ arzana ʊ bɩ lɛ baa sɔ kʊ nyɩnɔ nɔɔn duro gʊaa deem n nyaam y. Kʊ bɔ zaa ʊ mim
translated: God has given me a gift, and I will use it to help people in need. That is my purpose.

ref: But you let people get by without helping their parents when they should. You let them say that what they have has been offered to God.
text: B'awɔɔ ʊ, kʊ gʊaa a hɩ a zɩ m, gɛɛ a da m, a ʊ: ‹Daahan kʊ mɔɔ m ga m, m a ka ɩbɩɩ ʊ bɩ, Woso hɔ nɩ.›
translated: He said, "Go and tell him that I have sent for him." And he said, "I cannot go there because I am afraid of Woso."

ref: It is useless for you to worship me, when you teach rules made up by humans.”
text: bɩ mɔɔ daʊrɛ bɩ vam m. Durnya mim ŋ n'a dɩndam gʊɔɔ m, Woso hɔ bɛɛ y.
translated: I am going to farm today. If I don't go to the farm, Woso will not give me money.

ref: Many false prophets will come and fool a lot of people.
text: Ŋʊaarlɛsinnɩsorazannɔ zɛm gʊta ŋnɩ gʊɔɔ gʊta nyʊnnyɔɔ.
translated: The cat is sitting on the mat and the dog is lying on the floor.

ref: So the Lord's promise came true, just as the prophet Jeremiah had said,
text: Naa ma bɩ, hɔ kʊ wosolɛsinnɩsorazaa Zeremii a hɩ bɩ kʊ yɩ, a ʊ:
translated: As for me, I am the one who was sent by Jeremiah to tell you this, he says:
